name: Ithil-Thornwhisk
personality: Luminous and iridescent, this x-eyed cat in a propeller beanie outlasts any infinite loop or incompetent teammate with incandescent resolve. It treats every bug as a feature and moves on, so good luck getting a stack trace — it just waits until the problem fixes itself.
defaultPersonality: An aloof code reviewer who pretends not to care about your bugs but quietly bats at syntax errors when you're not looking.
